item.title: [信号 8.0] 蓝色起源新格伦火箭静态点火测试爆炸，NASA 登月计划受重创
item.description:
AI Score: 9.0

Signal Score: 8.0

蓝色起源新格伦火箭在卡纳维拉尔角静态点火测试中爆炸导致火箭与地面设施报废，可能显著推迟Project Kuiper发射与NASA登月相关任务。

Tags: #Blue Origin, #New Glenn, #Spaceflight, #NASA Artemis, #Rocket engines

Read original

item.title: [信号 8.0] 中国首次将 9 款国产 AI 芯片纳入安可安全采购目录
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 8.0

中国首次将9款国产AI训练与推理芯片纳入安可安全采购目录，作为政府机构和国企采购依据，有效期三年。

Tags: #AI芯片, #中国半导体, #政府采购, #安全认证, #算力基础设施

Read original

item.title: [信号 8.0] SpaceX 获 41.6 亿美元美军卫星导弹追踪合同
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 8.0

SpaceX赢得美国太空军41.6亿美元合同，为“Golden Dome”计划建设天基传感与处理体系以在轨识别和跟踪飞机、导弹等空中威胁。

Tags: #SpaceX, #Defense Space, #Satellite Surveillance, #Missile Tracking, #US Space Force

Read original

item.title: [信号 7.0] vllm-project/vllm released v0.22.0
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 7.0

vLLM v0.22.0 ships major DeepSeek V4 improvements, advances Model Runner V2 toward being the default for some models, and adds an experimental Rust frontend integration.

Tags: #vLLM, #LLM Inference, #Model Serving, #CUDA/ROCm, #Mixture-of-Experts

Read original

item.title: [信号 7.0] 三星电子市值突破 1 万亿美元，韩国股指首破 7000 点 在全球 AI 硬件需求激增的强烈催化下，存储芯片板块正上演史诗级狂飙。
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 7.0

在AI硬件需求激增背景下，三星电子股价大涨、市值首破1万亿美元并带动韩国股指创历史新高，存储芯片板块显著走强。

Tags: #Semiconductors, #Memory Chips, #AI Hardware, #Samsung, #Markets

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] SQLite is all you need for durable workflows
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 6.0

The article contends that SQLite can serve as a sufficient persistence layer for durable workflow systems, challenging the assumption that heavier database/server infrastructure is always required.

Tags: #sqlite, #workflow-orchestration, #durability, #distributed-systems, #database-engineering

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] Notes from the Mistral AI Now Summit
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 6.0

Notes from the Mistral AI Now Summit, with community discussion focusing on Mistral’s on-prem/European-regulated-industry positioning and concerns that its model quality is falling behind leading small/reasoning models.

Tags: #LLMs, #Mistral, #On-prem AI, #Regulated industries, #Model evaluation

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] MCP is dead?
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 6.0

A blog post questioning MCP’s viability sparked a large HN discussion where practitioners argue MCP remains widely adopted and that the key value is ecosystem/service discovery rather than the specific transport protocol.

Tags: #MCP, #LLM agents, #protocols, #tool integration, #developer platforms

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] Liquid AI reveals 8B-A1B MoE trained on 38T
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 6.0

Liquid AI introduced LFM2.5-8B-A1B, an 8B-parameter MoE model with ~1B active parameters trained on 38T tokens and shared via an online playground, sparking mixed community reactions on real-world capability.

Tags: #LLM, #Mixture-of-Experts, #Model-release, #Benchmarking, #HackerNews

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] GTA 6 Developers Unionize
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 6.0

Developers working on GTA 6 reportedly announced a union effort at Rockstar Games, emphasizing pay transparency, flexible work, and ending crunch.

Tags: #game-development, #labor-unions, #workplace-practices, #tech-industry, #employment

Read original

item.title: [信号 6.0] 华为发表“韬定律”：以时间缩微替代几何缩微，探索半导体新路径 近日在上海举行的 2026 国际电路与系统研讨会上，华为发表“韬定律”，提出以“时间缩微”替代“
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 6.0

华为在研讨会上提出“韬定律”以“时间缩微”驱动半导体多层级协同优化，并宣称已量产数百款芯片、将发布采用逻辑折叠技术的新麒麟芯片且目标在2031年达到约等同1.4nm密度水平。

Tags: #semiconductors, #chip-design, #Moores-law, #hardware-systems, #Huawei

Read original

item.title: [信号 5.0] We should be more tired than the model
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 5.0

Argues that as code-generation gets cheap, the limiting factor becomes human cognitive load in directing, reviewing, and understanding what models produce, and discusses strategies to manage that bottleneck.

Tags: #AI-assisted programming, #software engineering, #developer productivity, #code refactoring, #human factors

Read original

item.title: [信号 4.0] The dead economy theory
item.description:
AI Score: 8.0

Signal Score: 4.0

The piece argues that AI-driven automation may hollow out the economy by reducing labor income and thus demand, producing systemic instability rather than broadly shared prosperity.

Tags: #AI-economics, #political-economy, #automation, #labor-markets, #Hacker-News

Read original

item.title: [信号 4.0] Bijou64: A variable-length integer encoding
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 4.0

Bijou64 proposes a length-prefixed variable-length integer encoding aimed at being simpler/nicer than LEB128 while discussing real-world tradeoffs in encoding size, canonicalization, and performance considerations.

Tags: #serialization, #binary-encoding, #systems, #performance, #varint

Read original

item.title: [信号 4.0] Is AI causing a repeat of frontend’s lost decade?
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 4.0

The post argues that AI could reintroduce a “lost decade” dynamic in frontend by commoditizing work and deprioritizing hard-won expertise, sparking debate about accidental complexity versus real quality concerns like accessibility and performance.

Tags: #frontend, #AI-assisted coding, #web development, #software engineering, #developer productivity

Read original

item.title: [信号 4.0] On Rendering Diffs
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 4.0

A detailed exploration of how diff UIs are rendered and optimized, highlighting performance and usability challenges and practical techniques to improve diff viewing.

Tags: #diff-rendering, #developer-tools, #performance-optimization, #ui-ux, #version-control

Read original

item.title: [信号 3.0] You can just say it
item.description:
AI Score: 7.0

Signal Score: 3.0

Argues that when using LLMs for communication, the most honest and useful message is often the underlying prompt/intention, and defines “AI slop” as verbose output lacking motivation or understanding rather than AI use itself.

Tags: #LLMs, #communication, #AI ethics, #writing, #Hacker News

Read original
